explanation: The property states that globally (G), if the system is in PCV mode or PSV mode and the inspiratory pause is set by the GUI (inspiratoryPauseButton), then eventually (F) an inspiratory pause shall be initiated. This captures the requirement that the possibility to initiate an inspiratory pause exists under the specified conditions.

The property states that globally (G), if the system is in PCV mode or PSV mode and the inspiratory pause is set by the GUI (inspiratoryPauseButton is true), then an inspiratory pause will eventually (F) be initiated. This captures the 'possibility to initiate' as a system requirement: if the conditions are met, the pause will happen at some point in the future.

The property states that globally, if the system is in PCV mode or PSV mode AND the inspiratory pause is set by the GUI, then eventually an inspiratory pause shall be initiated. This captures the requirement for the possibility of initiating an inspiratory pause under specific mode and GUI conditions.

The property states that globally, if the system is in PCV mode or PSV mode AND the inspiratory pause is set by the GUI, then eventually an inspiratory pause must be initiated. This captures the 'possibility to initiate' by using the 'F' (future) operator, meaning it will happen at some point after the condition is met. The combined condition 'PCVMode | PSVMode' and 'inspiratoryPauseButton' forms the antecedent of the implication.

The property states that globally (G), whenever the system is operating in either PCV Mode or PSV Mode (bool_exp1) AND the inspiratory pause is activated by the GUI (bool_exp2), then eventually (F) an inspiratory pause (bool_exp3) must be initiated. This captures the requirement that the possibility to initiate an Inspiratory Pause exists under the specified conditions.

The property states that globally, if the system is in either PCV or PSV mode and the inspiratory pause button is pressed via the GUI, then an inspiratory pause will eventually be initiated. This captures the requirement that there shall be the 'possibility' to initiate the pause under the given conditions, interpreted as a liveness guarantee.

The property states that globally, if the system is operating in either PCV or PSV mode, and the inspiratory pause is set via the GUI (meaning the inspiratory pause button is pressed), then an inspiratory pause shall eventually be initiated. This captures the requirement for the possibility of initiating an Inspiratory Pause under the specified conditions.

The property states that globally, if the system is currently operating in either PCV or PSV mode AND the inspiratory pause is activated by the GUI, then an inspiratory pause shall eventually be initiated. This captures the requirement for the possibility of initiating an Inspiratory Pause under the specified conditions.

The property states that globally, if the system is currently operating in either PCV mode or PSV mode, and the inspiratory pause is requested via the GUI (inspiratoryPauseButton is true), then an inspiratory pause will eventually be initiated. This captures the requirement that there 'shall be the possibility' (Future operator F) for an inspiratory pause under the specified conditions.

The property states that globally, if the system is operating in either PCV or PSV mode AND the inspiratory pause is requested via the GUI (inspiratoryPauseButton), then an inspiratory pause will eventually be initiated (inspiratoryPause). This captures the 'possibility to initiate' by using the 'F' (future/eventually) operator.
